personal.name: Shobhit Chauhan
personal.bio: Frontend Developer passionate about building modern, responsive, interactive websites with React and JavaScript.
personal.longBio: I design and build interfaces that feel considered from the first pixel to the last transition. My focus is React — component systems that stay clean at scale, motion that earns its place, and layouts that hold up on every screen. I care about the details most people scroll past: the easing on a hover state, the rhythm of a grid, the weight of a headline.

about.story: I started out tinkering with static HTML pages and got hooked the moment CSS transitions felt alive. That curiosity turned into a career built around React — component-driven thinking, performance budgets, and interfaces that respect the person using them. Every project starts with a question: what's the one thing this screen needs to say?

education.school: School of Open Learning, University of Delhi
Govt. Sarvodaya Bal Vidhyalay, New Delhi

projects.title: Fortitude Gym
projects.description: A modern and responsive gym website featuring a clean UI, workout programs, trainer showcase, membership plans, and a mobile-friendly design for an engaging fitness experience.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A modern, responsive personal portfolio showcasing projects, technical skills, and contact information with smooth animations and a clean user interface.

projects.title: Dental Clinic Booking
projects.description: A modern and responsive dental clinic booking website featuring online appointment scheduling, doctor profiles, services, patient testimonials, and a clean healthcare-focused UI.

projects.title: SIMS Unisex Salon
projects.description: A modern and responsive salon website designed for SIMS Unisex Salon, featuring premium service showcases, online appointment booking, pricing, stylist information, testimonials, and an elegant user experience.

projects.title: Aperture — Photography Studio
projects.description: A cinematic one-page site for a photography studio with a full-bleed gallery and magnetic call-to-actions.

projects.title: Basecamp — Startup Landing
projects.description: A conversion-focused landing page for an early-stage startup with animated pricing tiers and a waitlist form.

services.title: Frontend Development
services.description: Production-grade interfaces built with React — clean component architecture, fast load times, zero layout shift.

services.title: Responsive Design
services.description: Layouts engineered to hold their shape from a 4K monitor down to a folded phone, with no broken breakpoints.

services.title: Landing Pages
services.description: High-conversion landing pages with motion that guides the eye, not distracts from the message.

services.title: Portfolio Websites
services.description: Personal sites that feel like a signature — distinctive typography, considered pacing, content you can edit yourself.

services.title: React Development
services.description: Hooks-based, reusable component systems that scale cleanly as the product grows.

services.title: Website Redesign
services.description: Taking a dated interface and rebuilding it with a modern design language, without losing what already works.

experience.description: Designing and building React-based websites and product interfaces for startups and independent founders.
Built and maintained component libraries in React and Tailwind CSS for client marketing sites.
Contributing UI components and documentation fixes to React ecosystem projects.

testimonials.name: Ananya Rao
testimonials.quote: Shobhit rebuilt our landing page and conversions went up within the first week. The animations feel expensive without ever feeling slow.

testimonials.name: Marcus Lee
testimonials.quote: Clean component structure, clear communication, and a real eye for detail. Handed off the design and got back exactly what we imagined.

testimonials.name: Priya Menon
testimonials.quote: One of the few developers who understands both code and design intent. The site he built still gets compliments months later.

faqs.question: What's your usual project turnaround?
faqs.answer: A single-page portfolio or landing site typically takes 1–2 weeks from kickoff to launch, depending on content readiness.

faqs.question: Do you work with existing designs?
faqs.answer: Yes — I can build from Figma files, or design and develop the full experience from scratch.

faqs.question: Can I update the content myself later?
faqs.answer: Every site I build is content-driven, so you can update text, images, and links without touching any component code.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing support?
faqs.answer: Yes, I offer maintenance retainers for clients who need continued updates after launch.
